---
title: "rigid_log"
generated: true
description: "Recover the Lie parameters of a rigid homogeneous matrix."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.transform`](../nitrix-geometry-transform.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:rigid_log -->
```python
rigid_log(matrix: Float[Array, '... d1 d1'], *, ndim: int) -> Float[Array, '... p']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:rigid_log -->
Recover the Lie parameters of a rigid homogeneous matrix.

Inverse of [`rigid_exp`](../nitrix-geometry-transform/rigid_exp.qmd).  The rotation block must be a proper
rotation.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:rigid_log -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `matrix` | `Float` | `...` × `d1` × `d1` | — | `(..., ndim + 1, ndim + 1)` homogeneous rigid transform. |
| `ndim` | `int` | — | — | Spatial dimensionality (2 or 3). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...` × `p`. Lie parameter vector, `(..., p)` with `p = 3` for `ndim == 2` ($\theta, t_x, t_y$) or `p = 6` for `ndim == 3` ($\omega_x, \omega_y, \omega_z, t_x, t_y, t_z$).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:rigid_log -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `d1` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
